title: Capital Structure: Which of the following best describes the impact of agency...
summary: Evaluate how agency costs influence capital structure decisions.
prompt: Which of the following best describes the impact of agency costs on capital structure?

options.text: Firm value decreases due to higher risk
Step 2: Understand that high agency costs can lead managers to prefer

solution:
Step 1: Define agency costs as the costs associated with conflicts of interest between stakeholders, primarily between owners and management.
Step 2: Understand that high agency costs can lead managers to prefer equity financing to avoid the increased scrutiny that debt requires.
Step 3: Thus, B accurately describes the impact of agency costs on capital structure decisions.
